sections.label: TOOL CALL: python

<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state after blue target click
nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print("Current frame nodes (left side, col < 30):")
for n in nodes:
    boundary = n['boundary']
    min_row = min(b[0] for b in boundary)
    max_row = max(b[0] for b in boundary)
    min_col = min(b[1] for b in boundary)
    max_col = max(b[1] for b in boundary)
    center_col = (min_col + max_col) / 2
    if center_col < 30 and n['pixels'] > 2:
        print(f"  Color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, bbox=[{min_row},{min_col}]-[{max_row},{max_col}]")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
